## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` pass locally.
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change.
- [ ] I updated docs (`README`, `ROADMAP`, or an ADR in `docs/decisions/`) if needed.
- [ ] I did not weaken the Electron security model (see `docs/architecture.md`).
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or non-update network calls were introduced.
